# --- Voice I/O ---
# faster-whisper              # offline STT (pip install faster-whisper)
# openai-whisper              # fallback STT
# sounddevice                 # microphone input
# edge-tts                    # Microsoft neural TTS (free)
# pyttsx3                     # fully offline TTS fallback
# noisereduce                 # spectral noise reduction
# silero-vad                  # voice activity detection

# --- Free LLM Router (zero-cost AI access) ---
# groq                        # Groq SDK (free 14,400 req/day)
# google-generativeai         # Google Gemini API (1M tokens/day free)
# cohere                      # Cohere API (1000 calls/month free)
# openai                      # OpenRouter (OpenAI-compatible)

# --- Desktop control ---
# pyautogui                   # mouse/keyboard/screenshot control
# pywinauto                   # Windows UI Automation
# pygetwindow                 # window enumeration
# pytesseract                 # OCR (requires Tesseract binary)
# pywin32                     # Windows API (win32api, win32gui)
# comtypes                    # COM interface
# pycaw                       # Windows Core Audio API
# pynput                      # mouse/keyboard event recording
# keyboard                    # global hotkeys
# pystray                     # system tray icon
# plyer                       # cross-platform notifications
# win10toast                  # Windows 10/11 toast notifications

# pymupdf                     # PDF reading (fitz)
# pdfplumber                  # PDF text + table extraction

# bitsandbytes                # 4-bit quantization
# accelerate                  # distributed training
